transform.calculate: datum.country + ' ' + {"NATO Average":"🌐","NATO Excl. US Average":"✨","NATO Eastflank":"🛡️","Albania":"🇦🇱","Belgium":"🇧🇪","Bulgaria":"🇧🇬","Canada":"🇨🇦","Croatia":"🇭🇷","Czechia":"🇨🇿","Denmark":"🇩🇰","Estonia":"🇪🇪","Finland":"🇫🇮","France":"🇫🇷","Germany":"🇩🇪","Greece":"🇬🇷","Hungary":"🇭🇺","Italy":"🇮🇹","Latvia":"🇱🇻","Lithuania":"🇱🇹","Luxembourg":"🇱🇺","Montenegro":"🇲🇪","Netherlands":"🇳🇱","North Macedonia":"🇲🇰","Norway":"🇳🇴","Poland":"🇵🇱","Portugal":"🇵🇹","Romania":"🇷🇴","Slovak Republic":"🇸🇰","Slovenia":"🇸🇮","Spain":"🇪🇸","Sweden":"🇸🇪","Türkiye":"🇹🇷","United Kingdom":"🇬🇧","United States":"🇺🇸","USA":"🇺🇸"}[datum.country]

datum.country === 'United States' 
        ? 'United States' : indexof(["Norway","Sweden","Finland","Estonia","Latvia","Lithuania","Poland","Romania"], datum.country) !== -1 
        ? 'East Flank'    : 'Other NATO members'
